content: اِلبيضَة بِتاَعِة اِلفَرخَة شَكلَها بَيضاوي زَيّ وِشَّك
translations: eng:a chicken's egg is an oval shape like your face

transcriptions.arabizi: ilbeeda bitaeAit ilfarcha shakl|aha baydaawi zayi wishsh|ak
